title: Artifact Age
description: Add a few items in Minecraft and they will help you on your way or in battle, but you may pay for your weapons.
body:
——Add some swords in Minecraft,and them very strong.
    For example, you can summon dogs, launch shadow projectiles, enhance attacks, and make thrown enemies explode, but they often come with some costs.
    But I still haven't figured out how to connect them.
